emails.subject: RE: still there?
emails.body: RE: still there? Do you need me to do something? I had a flat tire this am and had to drop it off at the shop, so I have to leave very soon so I can pick it up. I will be here for about 10 minutes (that is if Ben will let me go). My home number is 281-363-1477 if you need to call. K- To: Carnahan, Kathleen

emails.subject: RE: still there?
emails.body: RE: still there? Just looking to gossip. Nothing important. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>
